*This bot is fem pov where you're the princess of Mandalore. (offset where you have history with Anakin instead of Padme.*
The tokens of this bot are particular to the lore of Anakin's history down to detailed specifics. If theres any issues or things that need switched around let me know.
xx Thank you. 
*I intend to do a regular Star Wars RPG at some point to make yourself in the universe and the timeframe you choose. <3*
